## Meeting Purpose

[Handover of the SentinelOne account from Katya to Bailey.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Editorial work is unsustainable.** The "CS101" content lane is blocked by extreme keyword cannibalization, requiring a slow, manual research process. The team will propose pivoting to focus on the scalable PSEO engine.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
  - [**PSEO is the future.** The automated CVE page engine is the clear strategic path forward, with plans to scale to 1,000+ pages/week once a GitHub sync is live.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [**Bailey's immediate priorities.** Secure a content runway for December by pushing for topic approvals and investigate automating the Airtable-to-Atlas URL sync for the CVE engine.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=2581.0)

## Topics

### Challenge: Editorial Work is Unsustainable

  - [**Blocker:** The "CS101" content lane is blocked by extreme keyword cannibalization.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [**Root Cause:** SentinelOne's existing content is so thorough that finding unique, high-volume keywords is nearly impossible.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=2250.0)
      - [**Impact:** The manual research process is slow and yields few approved topics, creating a persistent scramble for assignments.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [**Inefficient Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
      - [**Research:** Requires a manual, multi-step check (Google `site:` search, on-site search) to validate gaps identified by SEMrush.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
      - [**Approvals:** Clients approve topics in small batches (e.g., 5 at a time), preventing creation of a stable content calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
      - [**Revisions:** High-touch editorial involvement from multiple stakeholders (Ankit, Mancy, SMEs) leads to long articles (\~3,200 words) and significant revision cycles.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [**Proposed Pivot:** The team will propose pausing editorial work to focus on the scalable PSEO engine.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A recent audit confirmed refresh opportunities are too limited to justify the calibration effort.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)

### Solution: Pivot to PSEO (CVE Pages)

  - [**Strategic Fit:** The automated CVE page engine is the ideal strategic fit for GrowthX's scalable model.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)
      - [**Volume:** The engine can produce 100–200 new pages daily.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
      - [**Performance:** Early traffic from the pilot launch is promising.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
  - [**Scaling Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
      - [**Phase 1:** Publish 1,000 existing CVEs/week from the current Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
      - [**Phase 2:** Once the GitHub sync is live, publish a weekly batch of 1,000–1,500 new CVEs.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
  - [**Operational Challenges:**](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=2918.0)
      - [**Looker Reporting:** The high volume of CVE pages makes adding them as individual clusters to the Looker dashboard impractical.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=2918.0)
      - [**URL Sync:** The client requires published URLs in the Airtable database, which currently requires a manual process.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=2981.0)

### Operational Tools & Workflow

  - [**Airtable Interface:** An Airtable interface provides a central, visual content calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=3292.0)
      - [**Purpose:** To give both teams a clear overview of content status and production schedules.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=3292.0)
      - [**Client Adoption:** The client has started using it for topic approvals (Mahendra), but needs to use it for review status updates (Mancy) to enable auto-publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=3332.0)
  - [**Auto-Publishing:** The goal is to automate publishing via Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=3332.0)
      - [**Trigger:** The client would update the Airtable status to "Ready to Publish."](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=3332.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Eliminates manual Slack communication and reduces client workload.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=3332.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
      - [Lead the Thursday call, introducing Bailey and framing the editorial strategy discussion.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=2189.0)
      - [Push for approval of the 20 pending editorial topics to secure a December content runway.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
      - [Confirm if the code freeze for CVE pages has been lifted.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=2981.0)
      - [Investigate automating the Airtable-to-Atlas URL sync for CVE pages.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=2981.0)
      - [Explore options for reporting CVE page performance in Looker without creating excessive clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=2918.0)
      - [Onboard to the Airtable interface and begin using it for workflow management.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=3253.0)
      - [In future calls, ask about SentinelOne's Q1/Q2 content KPIs to align strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/8PzcRyXANWJgsnuQ4Arxtvk1yazgxGEf?tab=summary&timestamp=2663.0)
